docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,288.11 FILED BY KINKO'S COPIES AS TO DEFENDANT BRUNO, MARK DBA JUST SO PRODUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-28-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07 TRIAL OF OCT-25-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRUNO, MARK DBA JUST SO PRODUCTION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KINKO'S COPIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRUNO, MARK DBA JUST SO PRODUCTION $1,288.11 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,303.11 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT BRUNO, MARK DBA JUST SO PRODUCTION
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23789, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KINKO'S COPIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRUNO, MARK DBA JUST SO PRODUCTION $1,088.11 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,103.11, JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23789 ON 6-19-95. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
